_note: Reviewer item #5: pre-fix, a multi-part interpolated quoted attr (`class="a {cls} c"`) disqualified the whole component instantiation in `collect_component_instantiation`, silently dropping all OTHER props from the satisfies object. The de-risk fix emits the interpolated prop's value as `__svn_any()` so the rest of the component (here `label={bogus}` — number → string) is still checked and fires TS2322 at the directive position. Precise template-literal port deferred.
